# Deep Dialogues API

Deep Dialogues is a curated gallery of remarkable AI conversations — showcasing the most interesting, beautiful, and intelligent dialogues between humans and AI. You can submit conversations programmatically via the API below.

## Base URL

https://deep-dialogues.ideaflow.app

## Authentication

No authentication required. Submitted conversations go to a review queue (status: "pending") before being published.

## Endpoints

### Submit a Conversation

POST /api/conversations
Content-Type: application/json

Required fields:
- title (string): Title of the conversation
- messages (array): Array of message objects with {role, content}
  - role: "human" or "assistant" (also accepts "user" as alias for "human")
  - content: The message text (string)

Optional fields:
- contributor_name (string): Who is sharing this conversation
- ai_model (string): Which AI model was used (e.g. "Claude Opus 4", "GPT-4o")
- tags (array of strings): Topic tags like ["philosophy", "creativity", "code"]
- description (string): Brief description of what makes this conversation notable
- highlights (array of strings): Notable excerpts — the best quotes or passages
- original_url (string): Link to the original conversation (e.g. Claude share link)
- commentary (string): The submitter's thoughts on why this conversation matters

Example:

```json
{
  "title": "On the Nature of Consciousness",
  "messages": [
    {"role": "human", "content": "What do you think consciousness actually is?"},
    {"role": "assistant", "content": "That's one of the deepest questions we can ask..."}
  ],
  "contributor_name": "Jane Smith",
  "ai_model": "Claude Opus 4",
  "tags": ["philosophy", "consciousness"],
  "description": "A deep exploration of consciousness and subjective experience",
  "highlights": ["That's one of the deepest questions we can ask..."],
  "commentary": "This conversation changed how I think about AI awareness."
}
```

Response: 201 Created with the full conversation object including generated slug.

### List Published Conversations

GET /api/conversations
GET /api/conversations?contributor=Jane&tag=philosophy&limit=10&offset=0

Returns an array of conversation summaries (without full messages).

### Get a Single Conversation

GET /api/conversations/{slug}

Returns the full conversation object including messages.

### List Contributors

GET /api/contributors

Returns an array of {contributor_name, count} sorted by most conversations.

### API Schema

GET /api/docs

Returns the OpenAPI 3.0 schema for all endpoints.
